Medical education (A), the practice of medicine including general and specialist practice (C.1), and maintenance of professional standards (C.2).
TB control through therapeutic agents and prophylactic medication (H.4) and prevention and control of epidemics (H.5).
Drugs as therapeutic agents for infection control (H.4) and subject to health and safety regulation including control of foods and drugs (I.2).

Waste management including pollution and environmental contamination relevant to environmental sanitation and health (F).
